svg.title: Arpanjeet Singh GitHub README theme switcher
svg.desc: An animated GitHub README banner that switches between the current live developer profile style and a Windows 95 Christmas desktop style.

g.text: AI Engineering · Multi-Agent Systems · Low-Level Curiosity
Everything goes stale. So do I. So I rebuild.
This panel fades into the Windows 95 version automatically.
and useful automation from first principles.
